title: Webinar: Opportunities to Collaborate with the U.S. Army ERDC
description: International industry and academia are invited to discover how to pursue innovation and collaboration opportunities with the U.S Army ERDC.
text:
The U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC) International Research Office invites international representatives from industry and academia to attend an informational webinar on Wednesday, June 12, from 2:00 pm BST/15:00 CEST (8:00 to 9:00 am CT) to discover how to pursue innovation and collaboration opportunities with ERDC.
Partnering with ERDCWERX, ERDC has actively engaged with diverse industry and academic entities. Through the ERDCWERX portal and a streamlined submission process, ERDC has awarded over $569 million in contracts and agreements to entities that have submitted for various ERDC solicitations.
Why You Should Participate
During this webinar, attendees will have the opportunity to connect with the ERDC International Research Office, discover how to pursue opportunities to collaborate with ERDC, and learn how to utilize ERDCWERX portal to submit innovative solutions for funding consideration by ERDC.
Attendees will also have a chance to engage with key resource partners including:
ERDC Office of Research and Technology Transfer
ERDC Office of Small Business Programs
Date and Time
Virtual
Wednesday, June 12, 2024
2:00 pm BST/15:00 CEST (8:00 – 9:00 am CT)
Speakers
Dr. Catie Stephens, Director, ERDC International Research Office (London, England)
Ms. Janice Karcher, Deputy Director, ERDCWERX (Vicksburg, Mississippi, USA)
Resources
ERDCWERX
